payload.description:
EvaluationTask detail related-resource cards regressed: the link icon moved into the right metadata slot and the right-side timestamp disappeared.

Behavior spec:
Feature: EvaluationTask related resource metadata
Scenario: Procedure and score version links show stable metadata
Given an EvaluationTask is shown in detail mode with a linked procedure and score version
When the related resource cards render
Then each card shows its link icon inline next to the linked identifier/title
And each card shows its relative timestamp in the right-side metadata area
And both timestamps use the shared Timestamp component styling.

Definition of Done:
- Procedure and Score Version RelatedResourceCard usages keep inline link icons.
- Right-side timestamps render through a shared timestamp prop/path.
- Focused EvaluationTask tests cover the layout.
payload.title: Restore EvaluationTask related resource timestamp layout
